action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Joers, Arney, Anderson, Andraca, Bare, Billings, Brown, Clancy, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Hong, Hysell, J. Jacobson, Johnson, Kirsch, Madison, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Phelps, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Tenorio, Udell, Vining, Mayadev, Prado, Sheehan, Stroud, Stubbs and Subeck; 
cosponsored by Senators Keyeski, Spreitzer, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Hesselbein, Larson, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, L. Johnson, Carpenter and Wirch
